name: io.github.codespar/mcp-sendgrid
description: MCP server for SendGrid — global transactional + marketing email (Twilio-owned). Pairs with @codespar/mcp-twilio for full messaging coverage.

environmentVariables.name: SENDGRID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SendGrid API key. Used as Bearer token in the Authorization header.

environmentVariables.name: SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Optional default From address used by send_mail / send_template when `from.email` is omitted. Must be a Verified Sender or authenticated domain.
